data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified all 3 implementation commits (e57fa8d2, c25b0bac, b8a3a32b) are on main. Confirmed: (1) rollbackAgentOwnedActionStateToQueue returns RollbackResult, adds kno notes, uses --status flag, and callers log rollbacks to UI terminal + interaction log; (2) buildTakePrompt instructs agents to exit on non-zero kno claim for both single-beat and parent/scene modes; (3) All 1952 tests pass. Note: tag commit:9c664af37ff6 appears to be from an unrelated commit — minor metadata issue.
